meta_title: Women's Health GP in Preston | HRT, Menopause & Smear Tests
meta_description: Private women's health appointments in Fulwood, Preston. Menopause, HRT, smear tests, contraception, UTIs and more. Dr Faizal Secretary. From £119.
hero_h1: Women's Health Care in Preston That Takes You Seriously
hero_sub: From menopause and HRT to smear tests, contraception and UTIs — Dr Faizal Secretary provides confidential, unhurried women's health appointments in Fulwood, Preston.
hero_trust: From £119 · Prescription Writing Included · Same-Day Available
intro_quote: You've been told your symptoms are 'normal'. You don't feel normal.
intro_heading: Women's Health Appointments in Fulwood, Preston
intro_para_1: Women's health covers a wide range of issues — some straightforward, some deeply personal. Dr Faizal Secretary provides a confidential, unhurried environment where you can talk openly.
intro_para_2: From smear tests and contraception to HRT, menopause management and fertility concerns — all handled with care and complete discretion.

faqs.question: What women's health issues do you cover?
faqs.answer: Smear tests, HRT, menopause, perimenopause, contraception, UTIs, PCOS, fertility concerns, irregular periods, vaginal health and more.

faqs.question: Can I get HRT through My Private Clinic?
faqs.answer: Yes. If HRT is clinically appropriate for you, Dr Secretary can prescribe it as part of your consultation. He will take a full history and discuss your options with you.

faqs.question: Is the consultation confidential?
faqs.answer: Completely. All consultations are confidential. Results are never shared without your consent.

faqs.question: Do I need to have had a previous smear test elsewhere?
faqs.answer: No. A smear test can be arranged as part of your appointment, whether or not you're overdue from the NHS.
